title: 200 Pieces Artificial Rose Petal 9 Pieces Heart Shape Candles Romantic Love Candle Tealight Candle Girl Scatter Petal for Wedding Valentine's Day Dinner Cake Decor Party Favor
features: Adequate quantity: you will get 9 pieces heart shape candles and 200 pieces realistic and gorgeous silk rose petals, adequate quantity for you to create your own romantic surrounding and spend a wonderful night with your lover

Nice for Valentine's Day: the romantic love candles and faux flower petals are suitable for weddings, bridal showers, proposal decoration, Valentine's Day or any other special moment and event; Use them to decorate home, table centerpiece, wedding cake, aisle, hotel and kitchen, invite your guest for tossing or to fill up the flower girl basket

Silk rose petal: these faux flower petals are made of quality polyester silk fabric material, easy to separate manually, look realistic and beautiful; The petals are substitute to real roses, for they're not easy to deform or fade and comfortable to touch

Romantic love candles: the tealight candles are made of paraffin material, and convenient to use; Heart shape combines with bright light and rose petals, easily for you to create a romantic atmosphere

Appropriate size: each of girl scatter petal is approx. 2 x 2 inches/ 5 x 5 cm, a similar size to real flowers, and the heart candle is approx. 3.3 cm/ 1.3 inches in diameter, nice accessories for decoration on special days or events
description: Product Description The petals are made of high-quality polyester silk, feels comfortable, looks realistic & do not distort or fade easily. Candles are made of paraffin wax, smokeless and non-toxic, easy to use. The heart shape design creates a romantic atmosphere. Comes with 200 red silk rose petals to satisfy your needs on special days.
